testcase.name: StynxDataModule integration > configures GUCs, retries serialization failures, and isolates the three pools
StynxDataModule integration > rejects owner role outside system context
StynxDataModule integration > rejects app role when actor context is missing
Stynx platform migrations > boots the platform schema, enforces RLS, and reruns idempotently
Stynx platform migrations > creates soft-deletable live/archive pairs and rejects invalid registry behavior
Transaction soft delete operations > dry-run and cascade limits do not mutate state
Transaction soft delete operations > archives cascade families, preserves deleted_at, and applies hide semantics
Transaction soft delete operations > keeps live queries default-only, exposes explicit archive helpers, and respects tenant RLS
Transaction soft delete operations > orders onlyDeleted by deleted_at desc by default
Transaction soft delete operations > restores archived parents when cascade is requested and detects restore conflicts
Transaction soft delete operations > raises a structured blocked error and supports hard delete on live and archive rows
Transaction soft delete operations > emits Prompt 10 metrics hooks for soft delete, restore, hard delete, and archive size
